messages.message:
Hello, I saw your advertisement on instagram. Could you send me the catalogs and media kits? 
Also the prices of the equipments you sell please.
你好，我在 Instagram 上看到了你的广告。你能把目录和媒体资料包发给我吗？
另外，请告诉我您销售的设备的价格。

Hi ,
Thanks for reaching out.
To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us:
 Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 How many units are you planning to purchase?
 Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?

I can also send you our full equipment catalog so you can see all available models.

Once I know your project type and quantity, I can also share the exact pricing for the models that fit your needs.

Hi ,
Thanks for reaching out.
To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us:
 Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 How many units are you planning to purchase?
 Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?
嗨，
感谢您的联系。
为了帮您推荐合适的普拉提 reformer，您能告诉我们：
 您是为工作室、健身房或转售业务购买吗？
 你计划购买多少台？
 机器将运往哪个市场/国家？I’m planning to sell to a studio
Planning on purchasing 4-5 units
Canada

I might buy 1unit to test out if I like something from the catalog. Then order more if the studio likes it

Thanks for the details, that helps a lot.

Since you’re supplying to a studio, most clients usually choose commercial-grade reformers designed for frequent use.

I’ll send you our full catalog so you can review all available models.

For studios, the most commonly selected models are:

感谢您提供详细信息，这非常有帮助。

由于您是供应给工作室，大多数客户通常会选择专为频繁使用而设计的商用级 reformers。

我会将我们的完整目录发送给您，以便您可以查看所有可用的型号。

对于工作室，最常选择的型号是：

MR001 – classic wooden studio reformer   
AR001 – aluminum commercial reformer   
AR011 – upgraded aluminum reformer used by many studios  

Many distributors initially consider ordering one unit to test, but because of international freight costs, shipping a single unit can be relatively expensive.

For projects like yours (4–5 units), ordering together is usually much more cost-efficient.

Once you have a look at the catalog, let me know which models interest you and I can send detailed pricing and videos.
https://hesurepilates.com/new-studio-ready-pilates-systems/
Could you send me the pricing of these?

document-refreshed-thinProducts Catalog (Compressed)-HeSure Pilates.pdf
产品目录（压缩版）-HeSure Pilates.pdfThis catalog you sent me, I can’t download it

No problem — sometimes WhatsApp has trouble downloading larger PDF files, especially if phone storage is limited.

I can send the catalog again later.

Here are the prices for the models you mentioned:

AR010 

没问题——有时 WhatsApp 在下载较大的 PDF 文件时会遇到问题，特别是如果手机存储空间有限时。

我稍后可以再次发送目录。

以下是您提到的型号的价格：

AR010 
1–9 units: $747 
1–9 件：$747

AR011 
1–9 units: $1207 
1–9 件：$1207

AR012 
1–9 units: $1341 
1–9 个单位：$1341

PK001 
1–9 units: $1,629 
1–9 个单位：1,629 美元

BS001 
1–9 units: $1,964 
1–9 个单位：$1,964

Since you mentioned planning for around 4–5 units for the studio, the 1–9 units pricing would apply.

If you'd like, I can also send detailed photos and videos for the models you're considering.

既然你提到计划为工作室购买大约 4-5 个单位，那么 1-9 个单位的定价将适用。

如果你需要，我也可以发送你考虑的模型的详细照片和视频。

So 1 unit price is the ones you gave me above?
所以 1 个单位的价格是上面你给我的那些？

Yes, if you purchase 1 unit, the price would be the same as the 1–9 units pricing I shared above.

For example:

AR010 – $747 
AR011 – $1207 
AR012 – $1341 
PK001 – $1629 
BS001 – $1964 

If you later proceed with 4–5 units for the studio, the price would remain within the same tier.

Once you decide which model you'd like to test, I can also help estimate the shipping cost to Canada.

Hi Neha,

Just checking in with you.
I know you were comparing several models for the studio side.

From the ones you selected, AR010, AR011, and AR012 are the three most comparable options, just at different levels of configuration and budget.

If you'd like, I can help you narrow it down to the most suitable one for a first test order based on what kind of studio your client is running. That may make the decision easier before moving to the larger 4–5 units order.
Yeah that sounds good

Great.

Based on what you shared about supplying a studio and planning for a small setup first, AR011 would usually be the model I recommend to start with.

It has a Balance Body–style frame, which many boutique studios prefer because of the look, stability, and overall studio feel.

AR010 is more of an entry-level commercial option, while AR012 is a higher configuration version.

So for a first test unit for a studio project, AR011 tends to be the most balanced choice.

If you'd like, I can send you a few detailed photos and a short video of AR011 so you can review it with the studio.
Yes please send me

But the pdf you sent me, I couldn’t download it the second time again
但是你发给我的那个 pdf，我第二次没能下载下来

No problem, sometimes WhatsApp has trouble downloading PDF files.

I'll send you the photos and a short video of the AR011 here so you can view them directly.

You can also share them with the studio to review.

Thank you
谢谢
ank you
I can show my client and she can decide

Are there any videos and photos for the AR010 and AR012 as well?
AR010 和 AR012 是否有视频和照片呢？

Yes, of course.

I also have photos and videos for AR010 and AR012. I’ll send them here so you can easily show them to your client.

AR010 is a very classic aluminum reformer and very cost-effective.

AR011 has a slightly upgraded structure and smoother carriage.

AR012 is a more premium version with additional design upgrades.

You can show all three options to your client and see which one she prefers.

Thank you, I will let you know what she decides
谢谢，我会告诉你她决定什么

No problem at all.

Take your time to review with your client. 
If she has any questions about the machines, specifications, or setup, feel free to let me know and I’ll be happy to help.
Great thank you

Hi Neha,

Just wanted to follow up with you.
I was thinking about the three models you reviewed with your client.

In a simple way:
AR010 is the more budget-friendly commercial option,
AR011 is the most balanced choice for most new studio setups,
and AR012 is the more premium version.
简单来说：
AR010 是更经济实惠的商业选项，
AR011 是大多数新工作室设置中最均衡的选择，
而 AR012 是更高端的版本。
If your client has already had a chance to review them, you can also tell me which direction she is leaning toward — budget, balanced, or premium — and I can help you narrow it down more clearly.

She is leaning towards premium or budget, but she is exploring her options with other reformer Pilates providers. I haven’t heard back from her yet, I will let you know if she decides something. 
I will suggest your options to my other clients, and let you know if anyone makes a decision

Thank you so much for reaching out to me for a follow up
非常感谢您联系我进行后续沟通

That makes sense — most clients usually compare a few options before deciding.

From what you described (choosing between budget and premium), what I’ve seen in similar studio setups is that many end up choosing something in between — not the lowest, but also not the highest.

That’s exactly where AR011 usually fits. It gives a more professional studio feel compared to entry models, without going all the way to the highest configuration.

So if your client is still deciding, AR011 is often the safest choice to start with — especially for a first setup.

Of course, happy to support you with anything you need when she’s ready.
这就很合理——大多数客户通常在决定前会比较几个选项。

根据你的描述（在预算和高级之间选择），我在类似的工作室设置中看到的情况是，很多人最终会选择介于两者之间的产品——既不是最低的，也不是最高的。

这恰恰是 AR011 通常适用的地方。与入门级产品相比，它提供了更专业的工作室感觉，但又没有完全达到最高配置。

所以如果你的客户还在决定，AR011 通常是开始时的最安全选择——尤其是对于首次设置。

当然，当她准备好时，我很乐意支持你所需的一切。

Hi Neha, Just wanted to check in with you. Since you mentioned you may also share these options with other clients, I thought I’d ask — have you had any recent projects leaning more toward budget, or more toward premium studio setups? I can help you keep the selection very simple depending on the client type, so it’s easier for you to present the right option without comparing too many models each time.
The client went with another agent. Currently the market is slow hence I haven’t gotten back to you with any purchases.
I will however reach out to you as soon as a new client comes in and is interested in your product. Thank you for checking in, I really appreciate it. Have a great day!

Thanks for letting me know, I appreciate the transparency. No worries at all — that happens quite often, especially when clients are comparing different options. If you have any upcoming clients, even at an early stage, feel free to share the requirements with me. I can help you quickly narrow down the most suitable model so it’s easier for you to present options. Happy to stay in touch.

last_customer_message: I will however reach out to you as soon as a new client comes in and is interested in your product. Thank you for checking in, I really appreciate it. Have a great day!
last_my_message: Thanks for letting me know, I appreciate the transparency. No worries at all — that happens quite often, especially when clients are comparing different options. If you have any upcoming clients, even at an early stage, feel free to share the requirements with me. I can help you quickly narrow down the most suitable model so it’s easier for you to present options. Happy to stay in touch.

所以如果你的客户还在决定，AR011 通常是开始时的最安全选择——尤其是对于首次设置。

当然，当她准备好时，我很乐意支持你所需的一切。

Hi Neha, Just wanted to check in with you. Since you mentioned you may also share these options with other clients, I thought I’d ask — have you had any recent projects leaning more toward budget, or more toward premium studio setups? I can help you keep the selection very simple depending on the client type, so it’s easier for you to present the right option without comparing too many models each time.
The client went with another agent. Currently the market is slow hence I haven’t gotten back to you with any purchases.
I will however reach out to you as soon as a new client comes in and is interested in your product. Thank you for checking in, I really appreciate it. Have a great day!

Thanks for letting me know, I appreciate the transparency. No worries at all — that happens quite often, especially when clients are comparing different options. If you have any upcoming clients, even at an early stage, feel free to share the requirements with me. I can help you quickly narrow down the most suitable model so it’s easier for you to present options. Happy to stay in touch.

me: Hi Neha,

Just wanted to follow up with you.
I was thinking about the three models you reviewed with your client.
me: In a simple way:
AR010 is the more budget-friendly commercial option,
AR011 is the most balanced choice for most new studio setups,
and AR012 is the more premium version.
简单来说：
AR010 是更经济实惠的商业选项，
AR011 是大多数新工作室设置中最均衡的选择，
而 AR012 是更高端的版本。
me: If your client has already had a chance to review them, you can also tell me which direction she is leaning toward — budget, balanced, or premium — and I can help you narrow it down more clearly.
customer: She is leaning towards premium or budget, but she is exploring her options with other reformer Pilates providers. I haven’t heard back from her yet, I will let you know if she decides something.

me: That makes sense — most clients usually compare a few options before deciding.

From what you described (choosing between budget and premium), what I’ve seen in similar studio setups is that many end up choosing something in between — not the lowest, but also not the highest.

That’s exactly where AR011 usually fits. It gives a more professional studio feel compared to entry models, without going all the way to the highest configuration.

So if your client is still deciding, AR011 is often the safest choice to start with — especially for a first setup.

seller_only_text:
Hi ,
Thanks for reaching out.
To help us recommend the right Pilates Reformer, could you please tell us:
 Are you buying for a studio, gym, or resale business?
 How many units are you planning to purchase?
 Which market/country will the machines be delivered to?
I can also send you our full equipment catalog so you can see all available models.

Once I know your project type and quantity, I can also share the exact pricing for the models that fit your needs.
Thanks for the details, that helps a lot.

Since you’re supplying to a studio, most clients usually choose commercial-grade reformers designed for frequent use.

I’ll send you our full catalog so you can review all available models.

For studios, the most commonly selected models are:

感谢您提供详细信息，这非常有帮助。

由于您是供应给工作室，大多数客户通常会选择专为频繁使用而设计的商用级 reformers。

我会将我们的完整目录发送给您，以便您可以查看所有可用的型号。

对于工作室，最常选择的型号是：

MR001 – classic wooden studio reformer   
AR001 – aluminum commercial reformer   
AR011 – upgraded aluminum reformer used by many studios  

Many distributors initially consider ordering one unit to test, but because of international freight costs, shipping a single unit can be relatively expensive.

For projects like yours (4–5 units), ordering together is usually much more cost-efficient.

Once you have a look at the catalog, let me know which models interest you and I can send detailed pricing and videos.
https://hesurepilates.com/new-studio-ready-pilates-systems/
No problem — sometimes WhatsApp has trouble downloading larger PDF files, especially if phone storage is limited.

I can send the catalog again later.

Here are the prices for the models you mentioned:

AR010 

没问题——有时 WhatsApp 在下载较大的 PDF 文件时会遇到问题，特别是如果手机存储空间有限时。

我稍后可以再次发送目录。

以下是您提到的型号的价格：

AR010 
1–9 units: $747 
1–9 件：$747

AR011 
1–9 units: $1207 
1–9 件：$1207

AR012 
1–9 units: $1341 
1–9 个单位：$1341

PK001 
1–9 units: $1,629 
1–9 个单位：1,629 美元

BS001 
1–9 units: $1,964 
1–9 个单位：$1,964

Since you mentioned planning for around 4–5 units for the studio, the 1–9 units pricing would apply.

If you'd like, I can also send detailed photos and videos for the models you're considering.

既然你提到计划为工作室购买大约 4-5 个单位，那么 1-9 个单位的定价将适用。

如果你需要，我也可以发送你考虑的模型的详细照片和视频。
Yes, if you purchase 1 unit, the price would be the same as the 1–9 units pricing I shared above.

For example:

AR010 – $747 
AR011 – $1207 
AR012 – $1341 
PK001 – $1629 
BS001 – $1964 

If you later proceed with 4–5 units for the studio, the price would remain within the same tier.

Once you decide which model you'd like to test, I can also help estimate the shipping cost to Canada.
Hi Neha,

Just checking in with you.
I know you were comparing several models for the studio side.

From the ones you selected, AR010, AR011, and AR012 are the three most comparable options, just at different levels of configuration and budget.

If you'd like, I can help you narrow it down to the most suitable one for a first test order based on what kind of studio your client is running. That may make the decision easier before moving to the larger 4–5 units order.
Great.

Based on what you shared about supplying a studio and planning for a small setup first, AR011 would usually be the model I recommend to start with.

It has a Balance Body–style frame, which many boutique studios prefer because of the look, stability, and overall studio feel.

AR010 is more of an entry-level commercial option, while AR012 is a higher configuration version.

So for a first test unit for a studio project, AR011 tends to be the most balanced choice.

If you'd like, I can send you a few detailed photos and a short video of AR011 so you can review it with the studio.
No problem, sometimes WhatsApp has trouble downloading PDF files.

I'll send you the photos and a short video of the AR011 here so you can view them directly.

You can also share them with the studio to review.
Yes, of course.

I also have photos and videos for AR010 and AR012. I’ll send them here so you can easily show them to your client.

AR010 is a very classic aluminum reformer and very cost-effective.

AR011 has a slightly upgraded structure and smoother carriage.

AR012 is a more premium version with additional design upgrades.

You can show all three options to your client and see which one she prefers.
No problem at all.

Take your time to review with your client. 
If she has any questions about the machines, specifications, or setup, feel free to let me know and I’ll be happy to help.
Hi Neha,

Just wanted to follow up with you.
I was thinking about the three models you reviewed with your client.
In a simple way:
AR010 is the more budget-friendly commercial option,
AR011 is the most balanced choice for most new studio setups,
and AR012 is the more premium version.
简单来说：
AR010 是更经济实惠的商业选项，
AR011 是大多数新工作室设置中最均衡的选择，
而 AR012 是更高端的版本。
If your client has already had a chance to review them, you can also tell me which direction she is leaning toward — budget, balanced, or premium — and I can help you narrow it down more clearly.
That makes sense — most clients usually compare a few options before deciding.

From what you described (choosing between budget and premium), what I’ve seen in similar studio setups is that many end up choosing something in between — not the lowest, but also not the highest.

That’s exactly where AR011 usually fits. It gives a more professional studio feel compared to entry models, without going all the way to the highest configuration.

So if your client is still deciding, AR011 is often the safest choice to start with — especially for a first setup.

Of course, happy to support you with anything you need when she’s ready.
这就很合理——大多数客户通常在决定前会比较几个选项。

根据你的描述（在预算和高级之间选择），我在类似的工作室设置中看到的情况是，很多人最终会选择介于两者之间的产品——既不是最低的，也不是最高的。

这恰恰是 AR011 通常适用的地方。与入门级产品相比，它提供了更专业的工作室感觉，但又没有完全达到最高配置。

所以如果你的客户还在决定，AR011 通常是开始时的最安全选择——尤其是对于首次设置。

当然，当她准备好时，我很乐意支持你所需的一切。
Hi Neha, Just wanted to check in with you. Since you mentioned you may also share these options with other clients, I thought I’d ask — have you had any recent projects leaning more toward budget, or more toward premium studio setups? I can help you keep the selection very simple depending on the client type, so it’s easier for you to present the right option without comparing too many models each time.
Thanks for letting me know, I appreciate the transparency. No worries at all — that happens quite often, especially when clients are comparing different options. If you have any upcoming clients, even at an early stage, feel free to share the requirements with me. I can help you quickly narrow down the most suitable model so it’s easier for you to present options. Happy to stay in touch.

2026-03-27 13:28｜我方：That makes sense — most clients usually compare a few options before deciding.

From what you described (choosing between budget and premium), what I’ve seen in similar studio setups is that many end up choosing something in between — not the lowest, but also not the highest.

That’s exactly where AR011 usually fits. It gives a more professional studio feel compared to entry models, without going all the way to the highest configuration.

So if your client is still deciding, AR011 is often the safest choice to start with — especially for a first setup.

Of course, happy to support you with anything you need when she’s ready.

这恰恰是 AR011 通常适用的地方。与入门级产品相比，它提供了更专业的工作室感觉，但又没有完全达到最高配置。
